news.t: Defiance Launches ZETX: The First Daily 2X Long ETF for Zeta Global Holdings Corp.

holdings.infoBox: ZETX is an equity ETF with a total of 11 individual holdings. The top holdings are US DOLLARS stock at 84.35%, ZETA GLOBAL SWAP MAREX-L at 40.55%, ZETA GLOBAL HOLDINGS CORP.-SWAP-NBCB-L at 36.86%, ZETA GLOBAL SWAP NOMURA-L at 36.75%, and ZETA GLOBAL SWAP CS-L at 35.21%.

overview.description: The Defiance Daily Target 2x Long ZETA ETF (ZETX) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in information technology equity. The fund seeks to deliver 2x leveraged exposure to the daily share price movement of Zeta Global Holdings Corp.  Class A (NYSE: ZETA), net fees and expenses, through derivatives like swap agreements ZETX was launched on Feb 3, 2026 and is issued by Defiance.

data.title: Defiance Launches ZETX: The First Daily 2X Long ETF for Zeta Global Holdings Corp.
data.text: MIAMI, Feb. 04, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Defiance ETFs today announced the launch of the  Defiance Daily Target 2X Long ZETA ETF (ZETX) , expanding its lineup of single-stock leveraged ETFs designed f...
